items.name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12657 Yellow] This Multiple wallet releases a modern style with Monogram Heritage canvas, delicately showcasing original Damier pattern details such as crosshatch textures and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo. 9 x 1.5 x 11.5 cm (H x W x L)

items.name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12172 Blue] As one of Louis Vuitton's classic designs, the Sarah wallet blends Monogram canvas with grained leather lining, recreating the elegance of the envelope style. It features a spacious interior with 2 large compartments, 1 central zip coin pocket, and multiple card slots. Safely stores daily essentials. 19 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Photo M12188 Blue] This Cléa wallet is crafted from Monogram Empreinte soft grained leather, highlighting the eye-catching Monogram embossing with a dual-tone effect. items.name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Real Shot M12382 Blue] This Romy card holder combines Louis Vuitton's iconic Monogram canvas with a colored leather lining. Its elegant and practical design features three card slots, a zippered coin pocket, and an extra slip pocket for tickets and receipts. The card holder easily fits into any pocket or handbag.

items.name_en: Beige Large Monogram Clutch
items.name_cn:
Beige Large Monogram Clutch
No.: 2esca490yxl_h27e_tu
Product Info
This A5 clutch is an elegant and minimalist accessory. Crafted from beige and black extra-large Oblique print fabric, it reinterprets the brand's classic pattern with a Dior logo on the front and grained calfskin trim. The zip compartment features a phone slip pocket and four card slots. Can be carried in hand or placed inside a handbag.
Beige and black extra-large Oblique print fabric
Front with metal-plated brass Dior logo
Interior with embossed Dior logo
Metal-plated brass zipper
Internal slip pocket
4 card slots
Size Info
Dimensions: 26.5x17.5 cm (LxH)
Fits A5 and US letter size documents # Fabric

items.name_en: [With full counter green packaging]!!️ GG Marmont leather double-fold wallet, Gucci continues to update colors with more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont collection with a modern perspective. This double-fold wallet is crafted from forest green leather, with brand identity accessories presented in palladium tone. Forest green leather, palladium tone accessories, double G, eight card slots, two bill compartments.
